title: PandaEar 6 Pack Silicone Baby Weaning Spoons and Forks Set| Toddler Cutlery Self Feeding Spoons for Baby| Anti-Choke Design for Baby Led Weaning 3 Months Plus (Blue Green Tan)
features: 【100% Silicone SAFE NON-TOXIC 】 Our baby feeding spoons are BPA-free, BPS-free, PVC-free, phthalate-free, cadmium-free and lead-free

【PROTECTIVE BARRIER 】 The choke barrier offers extra safety, stopping babies from sticking the entire spoon and fork in their mouth. These baby spoons self feeding are hand wash and top-rack dishwasher safe.
【INDEPENDENT FEEDING 】 Our baby baby weaning spoons are ideal for little ones to learn how to feed themselves, simultaneously encouraging motor skills development.
【 ERGONOMIC HANDLE ]】 The baby spoons 4 months 6+ months with short and rounded handle make it easier for babies to get food in their mouth.

【100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE 】We want you to purchase your MOST popular baby led weaning spoons knowing you will be fully satisfied. It’s that simple. If for any reason you are not happy with your purchase, we will completely refund your order.
description: Welcome to PandaEar, At PandaEar everything we do starts with Mom and Baby in mind. As a family run company full of little ones ourselves – we only offer baby spoons we trust and use in our own home. Our silicone spoon and fork are put under countless tests to ensure they work for baby, they’re fun but most importantly they are SAFE! ✅ Aesthetically pleasing and super functional. The baby weaning spoons are great for feeding purees. ✅ Their soft tips are gentle on tender gums while shallow for easy and safe feeding! ✅ Perfectly sized for the littlest of mouths! ✅ The short and round handle makes it comfortable to be held. What Are You Waiting For, Order Yours Today!
